name: CMAT
notes: Singer-songwriter. Mercury Prize nominated. Critically acclaimed internationally — WaPo, NME, Pitchfork coverage. Her articles almost never mention Meath.

name: Tommy Tiernan
notes: Stand-up comedian and chat show host (Tommy Tiernan Show, RTÉ). Regular Netflix specials.

name: Rory O'Connor
notes: Hugely popular social media comedian, now touring live shows.

name: Pierce Brosnan
notes: Born Drogheda, grew up Navan. James Bond. Still active in film and press.

name: Seán Boylan
notes: Legendary Meath GAA manager turned herbalist. Still active in media and public life. Worth tracking.

name: Colm O'Rourke
notes: RTÉ Sunday Game analyst. Still very prominent as a pundit — comments make national news.

name: Francis Ledwidge
notes: WWI poet (1887–1917). Occasional cultural features, anniversaries, museum events. Low frequency.
